name: harness
description: Four independent harness-engineering tools, each answering one question. /harness:reasoning-gaps — Can an AI understand this code well enough to change it correctly? (Audits for untyped signatures, implicit control flow, hidden state, structural complexity.) /harness:feedback-blockers — Can an AI edit this code and know if it got it right? (Audits for verification and observability gaps.) /harness:setup — Where does harness-engineering material live in this repo? (Scaffolds the harness directory.) /guru-dev-review — Does this change belong inside something that already exists, or do I need new structure? (Senior-dev decision, including Option E flag-tier and removal-trigger choices for behavior changes; output handed to superpowers:writing-plans for task decomposition.) Plus reference docs option-e-mechanics.md and rule-checklist.md that executors consult during implementation.
